testcase.name: runScenario["Login with valid credentials", "Facebook Login Functionality"](1)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with valid credentials # src/test/java/com/app/cucumber/login.feature:6 Given user is on Facebook login page # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.user_is_on_facebook_login_page() When user enters valid email and password # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.user_enters_valid_email_and_password() And clicks on login button # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.clicks_on_login_button() login successfully Then user should be logged in successfully # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.user_should_be_logged_in_successfully()
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. Jun 20, 2026 1:59:26 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 149, returning the closest version; found: 148; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 149

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with invalid credentials", "Facebook Login Functionality"](2)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with invalid credentials # src/test/java/com/app/cucumber/login.feature:11 Given user is on Facebook login page # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.user_is_on_facebook_login_page() When user enters invalid email and password # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.user_enters_invalid_email_and_password() And clicks on login button # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.clicks_on_login_button() Invalid or Incorrect email Then "Invalid or Incorrect email" message is displayed # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.message_is_displayed(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: Jun 20, 2026 1:59:28 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 149, returning the closest version; found: 148; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 149

testcase.name: runScenario["Register with valid data", "Facebook Registration Functionality"](3)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Register with valid data # src/test/java/com/app/cucumber/registration.feature:7 Given user is on Facebook login page # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.user_is_on_facebook_login_page() When user clicks on Create New Account # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.user_clicks_on_create_new_account() Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... 18 Retrying... Male When user enters valid registration details # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.user_enters_valid_registration_details() And clicks on Sign Up button # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.clicks_on_sign_up_button() account created successfully Then user account should be created successfully # com.app.stepdefinations.StepdefinitionImpl.user_account_should_be_created_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["Register with empty fields", "Facebook Registration Functionality"](4)

failure.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//span[text()='Could not validate your mobile number.
